headline: Couples may need more than $400,000 to cover health-care costs in retirement, even with Medicare
summary: A 65-year-old couple may need about $400,000 to have a 90% chance of covering health costs over the course of retirement.

headline: Centene’s North Carolina Merger Tests Scale Benefits And Undervalued Thesis
summary: Centene is combining its North Carolina subsidiaries, Carolina Complete Health and WellCare of North Carolina, into a single provider-led managed care organization under the Carolina Complete Health brand. The combined entity is expected to serve more than 980,000 Medicaid, Medicare, and Marketplace members across the state. This move further consolidates Centene's government-sponsored health programs in a key market under one operating structure. For investors watching NYSE:CNC, this North...

headline: Is Centene’s (CNC) New Medicare Leadership Structure a Signal on Its Government Program Strategy?
summary: Earlier this month, Centene Corporation created two new executive leadership roles reporting to CEO Sarah London, hiring Daniel Finke as Group President, Markets and Commercial, and elevating Michael Carson to Group President, Medicare and Specialty to oversee its Medicaid, Commercial, Medicare, and Specialty businesses. This leadership reshaping, combined with recent regulatory developments in Medicare payments, highlights how Centene is reorganizing its business to respond to cost...
